prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别约为41852名、48891名、48716名、65942名、64571名。2021至2023年位次在4.2万–4.9万区间波动，2024 年大幅后移至约6.6万，2025年小幅回升至约6.46万，近两年整体在6.5万附近震荡，2025年基准位次约64571名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年279人、 2022年278人、2023年296人、2024年302人、2025年328人、2026年345人。2026年计划较2025年增加17人，扩招约5.18%，招生规模持续扩大，对竞争有一定缓解作用， 但扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海南大学是国家211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第144名、2022年第130名、2023年第118名、2024年第104名 、2025年第93名、2026年第87名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；抖音热度排名第32位（较热），综合热度约136.5万，短视频平台曝光度较高，报考关注度处于中等 偏上水平；未见明显投档断档记录；海南大学在第五轮学科评估中未查到A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在热带农业、海洋等领域，与招生专业中的农学 、植物保护、水产养殖学、海洋科学等方向对应，但整体学科评估层次对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度趋势：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，法学、汉语言文学等文科专业偏热，土木建筑、生化环材等持续劝退；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万 人（+5.7%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；海南大学位于海南省海口市，与山东省跨省距离较远 ，地域偏好上山东考生对海南高校的报考热度受气候、距离等因素影响，整体属于中等水平；该校在山东省招生计划占比较大（2025年328人），属于省外招生较多的院校之一。\ n综合2025年基准位次64571名、2026年扩招约5.18%、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%导致竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升提升吸引力 等因素。预测2026年最低录取位次约66779名，区间66279–67279名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约66779名，区间66279–67279名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报（自动化、电子信息、金融学等），一档专业（法学、计算机、会计学）可作为冲刺选 择，三档专业（农学、园艺、旅游管理）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<66279）可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>67279）建议以二档为主、三档保底。海南 大学在山东招生专业较多，专业间分差较大，建议结合个人兴趣和职业规划合理搭配冲稳保。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hainan University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 41,852, 48,891, 48,716, 65,942, and 64,571 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 42,000 and 49,000 from 2021 to 2023, then significantly dropped to about 66,000 in 2024, and slightly recovered to around 64,600 in 2025. In recent two years, rankings have oscillated around 65,000, with a baseline ranking of approximately 64,571 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Hainan University in Shandong Province comprehensive category: 279 in 2021, 278 in 2022, 296 in 2023, 302 in 2024, 328 in 2025, and 345 in 2026. The 2026 plan increases by 17 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 5.18%. Enrollment scale continues to expand, which somewhat alleviates competition, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been steadily rising: 144th in 2021, 130th in 2022, 118th in 2023, 104th in 2024, 93rd in 2025, and 87th in 2026. The rankings reflect continuous improvement in the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. Douyin popularity ranking is 32nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.365 million. Short video platform exposure is relatively high, and application attention is at an upper-middle level. No obvious records of admission gaps were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University did not have any A- or above level disciplines. Its advantageous disciplines are mainly in tropical agriculture, marine fields, etc., corresponding to majors such as Agronomy, Plant Protection, Aquaculture, and Marine Science in the enrollment majors. However, the overall discipline evaluation level has limited appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity trends: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended; Law, Chinese Language and Literature and other liberal arts majors are relatively popular; Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials and other majors continue to be discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, which is far from Shandong Province across provinces. In terms of regional preference, the popularity of Hainan universities among Shandong candidates is affected by factors such as climate and distance, overall at a medium level. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province accounts for a relatively large proportion (328 in 2025), making it one of the universities with higher out-of-province enrollment. Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 64,571, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.18%, the increase in Shandong candidates by about 5.7% leading to intensified competition, and the continuous improvement in Soft Science rankings enhancing attractiveness, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 66,779, with a range of 66,279 to 67,279.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Landscape Architecture (Danzhou Campus)
- Tourism Management (Guanlanhu Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 66,779, with a range of 66,279 to 67,279. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Electronic Information, Finance, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Law, Computer Science, Accounting) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Agronomy, Horticulture, Tourism Management) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<66,279), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>67,279), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety. Hainan University offers many majors in Shandong, with large score differences between majors. It is advised to combine personal interests and career plans to reasonably arrange reach, match, and safety choices.
